summary: Iteration 21 - Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Integration Testing COMPLETED. All backend APIs pass (14/14 tests). Frontend pages (Meta Settings for Super Admin, Meta Analytics for Branch Admin) load correctly with proper role-based access control.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Console warnings about hydration errors (<tr> inside <span>, <span> inside <tbody>) are present but don't affect functionality

meta_settings_page_super_admin.details: Meta Settings page at /meta-settings loads correctly for Super Admin. Shows webhook endpoint URL, setup instructions, branch configurations with App ID/Page ID. Edit dialog works with form fields for App ID, App Secret, Page IDs, etc.

meta_analytics_page_branch_admin.details: Meta Analytics page at /meta-analytics loads correctly for Branch Admin. Shows summary cards (Total Spend, Total Leads, Cost per Lead, CTR), secondary stats (Impressions, Reach, Clicks), tabs (AI Insights, Campaigns, Facebook Leads), Sync Data button, and days filter.

sidebar_access_control.details: Meta Settings visible ONLY for Super Admin (Admin role). Meta Analytics visible ONLY for Branch Admin. Access control working correctly.

meta_config_crud_apis.details: POST /api/meta/config creates config with webhook_verify_token returned. GET /api/meta/config/{branch_id} returns config with hidden secrets. PUT /api/meta/config/{branch_id} updates config. GET /api/meta/configs lists all configs (Super Admin only).

meta_analytics_api.details: GET /api/meta/analytics/{branch_id} returns period, summary (total_spend, total_leads, cost_per_lead, ctr, etc.), campaigns, daily_trend. AI analysis available when data exists.

meta_leads_api.details: GET /api/meta/leads returns Facebook leads. Supports branch_id and synced filters. Branch Admin sees only their branch leads.

webhook_endpoints.details: GET /api/webhooks/facebook-leads exists for Meta verification. POST /api/webhooks/facebook-leads accepts lead webhook payloads.

role_access_control.details: Branch Admin denied access to /api/meta/configs (403). Branch Admin has access to own branch analytics. Super Admin has full access to all Meta APIs.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test config from main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meta integration is fully working. Test config exists for Pathankot branch (id: 18ec2cdd-28d2-4f0a-a85a-9077b5f52c21). Analytics show 0 values because no real Facebook data has been synced. AI analysis will show when data exists. Facebook webhook endpoint is /api/webhooks/facebook-leads.
notes: Facebook API integration requires real access token for actual data sync. Current test verifies API structure and flow work correctly. All analytics show 0 because no real Facebook ad data has been synced.
